'''Ingey''' was a small, [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Feline/Legends|feline]] animal identified as a [[Tessellated Arboreal binjinphant]].

==Biography==
It was owned by a young boy named [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Coby]] of [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]]. Ingey had a playful demeanor and once caused a ruckus by scurrying across the shoulders of the [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. The animal's presence caused the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to topple backwards, upsetting a tray full of food. When Coby was nine years old, he was enrolled in the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]]. [[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] [[Jann Tosh]] escorted the boy to a [[Zallakesh|space port]] on [[Chuzalla]]. A group of brigands known as the [[Starhunter's Intergalactic Menagerie]] abducted the rare and valuable Ingey, and brought him to [[Dandelo]]. Coby and Tosh, along with C-3PO and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], followed the Starhunters and rescued Ingey.
